package fixture

import "context"

// ServerboundDecode models an atlas serverbound packet decoder. The Decode
// method walks r.Read* primitives — the analyzer should normalize these to
// the same Encode1/Encode2/Encode4 ops that the symmetric Encode method
// produces, so the diff engine can compare wire shapes byte-for-byte against
// IDA Send* entries that record Encode×N on the client side.
type ServerboundDecode struct {
	kind uint8
	id   uint32
	flag int16
	text string
}

func (m *ServerboundDecode) Decode(l interface{}, ctx context.Context) func(r anyReader, opts map[string]interface{}) {
	return func(r anyReader, opts map[string]interface{}) {
		m.kind = r.ReadByte()
		m.id = r.ReadUint32()
		m.flag = r.ReadInt16()
		m.text = r.ReadAsciiString()
	}
}

// anyReader stubs the request.Reader interface atlas uses, exposing the same
// method names primFromName recognizes (ReadByte / ReadUint32 / ReadInt16 /
// ReadAsciiString).
type anyReader interface {
	ReadByte() byte
	ReadUint32() uint32
	ReadInt16() int16
	ReadAsciiString() string
}
